entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop being improved for virus resistance

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that causes rosette disease in groundnuts

entities.name: GRV RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to resist the groundnut rosette virus

entities.name: SHORT-DURATION
entities.description: A trait describing groundnut types that mature quickly

entities.name: BOLD-SEEDED
entities.description: A trait describing groundnuts with large seeds, preferred for confectionary use

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region targeted by the improvement program

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process used to develop resistant and agronomically acceptable groundnut cultivars

entities.name: F4 STAGE
entities.description: The fourth filial generation of the breeding material

entities.name: INHERITANCE
entities.description: The genetic mechanism by which resistance to GRV is passed to offspring

entities.name: CONFECTIONARY TRADE
entities.description: The commercial market for bold-seeded groundnuts
